title: elaeocarpus stipularis
intro: Elaeocarpus stipularis, also known as the Blue Apple or Blue Fig, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting digestive health. Elaeocarpus stipularis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia.
